codeSystems.name: ActionCardinalityBehavior
codeSystems.title: ActionCardinalityBehavior

codeSystems.name: ActionConditionKind
codeSystems.title: ActionConditionKind
codeSystems.description: Defines the kinds of conditions that can appear on actions.

codeSystems.name: ActionGroupingBehavior
codeSystems.title: ActionGroupingBehavior
codeSystems.description: Defines organization behavior of a group.

codeSystems.name: ActionParticipantRole
codeSystems.title: Action participant role
codeSystems.description: Either a practitioner role or a relationship type.

codeSystems.name: ActionParticipantType
codeSystems.title: ActionParticipantType
codeSystems.description: The type of participant for the action.

codeSystems.name: ActionPrecheckBehavior
codeSystems.title: ActionPrecheckBehavior
codeSystems.description: Defines selection frequency behavior for an action or group.

codeSystems.name: ActionRelationshipType
codeSystems.title: ActionRelationshipType
codeSystems.description: Defines the types of relationships between actions.

codeSystems.name: ActionRequiredBehavior
codeSystems.title: ActionRequiredBehavior
codeSystems.description: Defines expectations around whether an action or action group is required.

codeSystems.name: ActionSelectionBehavior
codeSystems.title: ActionSelectionBehavior
codeSystems.description: Defines selection behavior of a group.

codeSystems.name: ActionType
codeSystems.title: ActionType
codeSystems.description: The type of action to be performed.

codeSystems.name: SNOMEDCTBodyStructures
codeSystems.title: SNOMED CT Body Structures
codeSystems.description: This value set includes all codes from [SNOMED CT](http://snomed.info/sct) where concept is-a 442083009 (Anatomical or acquired body site (body structure)).

codeSystems.name: SNOMEDCTClinicalFindings
codeSystems.title: SNOMED CT Clinical Findings
codeSystems.description: This value set includes all the "Clinical finding" [SNOMED CT](http://snomed.info/sct) codes - concepts where concept is-a 404684003 (Clinical finding (finding)).

codeSystems.name: Condition/Problem/DiagnosisCodes
codeSystems.title: Condition/Problem/Diagnosis Codes
codeSystems.description: Example value set for Condition/Problem/Diagnosis codes.

codeSystems.name: DataAbsentReason
codeSystems.title: DataAbsentReason
codeSystems.description: Used to specify why the normally expected content of the data element is missing.

codeSystems.name: DefinitionTopic
codeSystems.title: DefinitionTopic
codeSystems.description: High-level categorization of the definition, used for searching, sorting, and filtering.

codeSystems.name: GoalCategory
codeSystems.title: Goal category
codeSystems.description: Example codes for grouping goals to use for filtering or presentation.

codeSystems.name: GoalPriority
codeSystems.title: Goal priority
codeSystems.description: Indicates the level of importance associated with reaching or sustaining a goal.

codeSystems.name: GoalStartEvent
codeSystems.title: Goal start event
codeSystems.description: Identifies types of events that might trigger the start of a goal.

codeSystems.name: Jurisdiction ValueSet
codeSystems.title: Jurisdiction
codeSystems.description:
This value set defines a base set of codes for country, country subdivision and region    for indicating where a resource is intended to be used.   
   
   Note: The codes for countries and country subdivisions are taken from    [ISO 3166](https://www.iso.org/iso-3166-country-codes.html)    while the codes for "supra-national" regions are from    [UN Standard country or area codes for statistical use (M49)](http://unstats.un.org/unsd/methods/m49/m49.htm).

codeSystems.name: CommonLanguages
codeSystems.title: Common Languages
codeSystems.description: This value set includes common codes from BCP-47 (http://tools.ietf.org/html/bcp47)

codeSystems.name: LibraryType
codeSystems.title: LibraryType
codeSystems.description: The type of knowledge asset this library contains.

codeSystems.name: ObservationCategoryCodes
codeSystems.title: Observation Category Codes
codeSystems.description: Observation Category codes.

codeSystems.name: LOINCCodes
codeSystems.title: LOINC Codes
codeSystems.description: This value set includes all LOINC codes

codeSystems.name: ObservationInterpretationCodes
codeSystems.title: Observation Interpretation Codes
codeSystems.description:
A categorical assessment, providing a rough qualitative interpretation of the observation value,    such as “normal”/ “abnormal”,”low” / “high”, “better” / “worse”, “susceptible” / “resistant”, “expected”/ “not expected”.    The value set is intended to be for ANY use where coded representation of an interpretation is needed.   
   
   Notes:
   
   This is being communicated in v2.x in OBX-8 (Observation Interpretation), in v3 in ObservationInterpretation (CWE) in R1 (Representative Realm) and in FHIR in    Observation.interpretation. Historically these values come from the laboratory domain, and these codes are extensively    used. The value set binding is extensible, so codes outside the value set that are needed for interpretation concepts    (i.e. particular meanings) that are not included in the value set can be used, and these new codes may also be added to    the value set and published in a future version.

codeSystems.name: ObservationMethods
codeSystems.title: Observation Methods
codeSystems.description: Observation Method codes from [SNOMED CT](http://snomed.info/sct) where concept is-a 272394005 (Technique (qualifier value)) or is-a 129264002 (Action (qualifier value)) or is-a 386053000 (Evaluation procedure(procedure))

codeSystems.name: ObservationStatus
codeSystems.title: ObservationStatus
codeSystems.description: Codes providing the status of an observation.

codeSystems.name: PlanDefinitionType
codeSystems.title: PlanDefinitionType
codeSystems.description: The type of PlanDefinition.

codeSystems.name: PublicationStatus
codeSystems.title: PublicationStatus
codeSystems.description: The lifecycle status of an artifact.

codeSystems.name: ObservationReferenceRangeAppliesToCodes
codeSystems.title: Observation Reference Range Applies To Codes
codeSystems.description: This value set defines a set of codes that can be used to indicate the particular target population the reference range applies to.

codeSystems.name: ObservationReferenceRangeMeaningCodes
codeSystems.title: Observation Reference Range Meaning Codes
codeSystems.description: This value set defines a set of codes that can be used to indicate the meaning/use of a reference range for a particular target population.

codeSystems.name: RequestIntent
codeSystems.title: RequestIntent
codeSystems.description: Codes indicating the degree of authority/intentionality associated with a request.

codeSystems.name: RequestPriority

codeSystems.description: The clinical priority of a diagnostic order.

codeSystems.name: RequestStatus
codeSystems.title: RequestStatus
codeSystems.description: Codes identifying the lifecycle stage of a request.

codeSystems.name: SubjectType
codeSystems.title: Subject type
codeSystems.description: Possible types of subjects.

codeSystems.name: RegimenIntentVS
codeSystems.title: Regimen Intent Value Set
codeSystems.description:
The clinical intent of an anti-cancer regimen. All codes are drawn from
the SNOMED CT \"Intents (nature of procedure values)\" hierarchy (363675004).

**mCODE Migration Candidate** — Proposed for mCODE STU5.

codeSystems.name: TreatmentLineVS
codeSystems.title: Treatment Line Value Set
codeSystems.description:
Codes representing the ordinal line of systemic anti-cancer therapy.
Used in LineOfTherapyObservation.valueCodeableConcept and the RegimenTreatmentLine extension.

**mCODE Migration Candidate** — Proposed for mCODE STU5.
